notes: Blast Master Pro was a Group 10 Mining project. My individual role was Firebase Lead, which meant I focused on the cloud backend side of the app: Firebase setup, authentication planning, database structure, and helping the team connect app features to stored project data.
impact_summary: My Firebase contribution supported the Mining purpose of Blast Master Pro by giving the app a reliable backend foundation. This helped the team manage user access, store important app information, and test the project workflow with clearer data handling.

commits.title: Firebase project setup
commits.details: Prepared the Firebase environment for Blast Master Pro and checked the service configuration needed for app integration.

commits.title: Authentication support
commits.details: Planned and supported the login flow so the app could manage user access in a structured way.

commits.title: Database structure planning
commits.details: Helped organize the Firebase data structure for Mining app records, project status information, and team testing needs.

commits.title: Backend connection testing
commits.details: Worked with Group 10 to check Firebase connection behavior and support smoother communication between the app and backend.

pull_requests.title: Firebase lead handoff
pull_requests.details: Documented the Firebase setup and backend responsibilities so the team could understand and continue the app integration.

pull_requests.title: Reviewed backend reliability
pull_requests.details: Checked authentication and data flow behavior during testing to reduce connection issues in the project.

pull_requests.title: Recorded individual contribution
pull_requests.details: Clarified that my individual role in Group 10 was Firebase Lead for Blast Master Pro, focused on backend and cloud support.
